items.title: Sui Foundation says ‘major upgrade’ fixed bugs behind three outages
items.summary: The Sui Network's first two outages were caused by bugs introduced in its 1.72 update, while an interim fix deployed to restore the blockchain triggered the third.

items.title: Bitcoin's biggest ETF selloff yet hits $3.4 billion as AI stocks keep climbing
items.summary: U.S. spot bitcoin funds bled cash for 11 straight sessions through Monday, the longest redemption streak since their 2024 launch, as risk dollars rotated toward an AI-led equities rally.

items.title: Strategy’s Bitcoin sale causes clash for $80M in Polymarket bets
items.summary: A clash has erupted among Polymarket users over the timing and disclosure of a recent Bitcoin sale by Strategy, with more than $80 million traded on the disputed outcome.

items.title: Strategy’s bitcoin sale sparks a $14 million betting chaos on Polymarket
items.summary: The 8-K filing by Strategy Monday disclosed sales for the period May 26 to May 31, but the disclosure was issued on June 1. Polymarket's May 31 contract is sitting at 81% Yes and in review, while bettors argue over whether the onchain transactions or the filing date controls.

items.title: Live markets: Bitcoin retreats under $72,000 as Strategy unloads BTC for first time in four years
items.summary: Crypto markets continue to struggle even as risk markets across the globe surge higher.

items.title: Bitcoin, ether start June in the red while futures show taste for risk. XLM, HYPE gain
items.summary: Bitcoin and ether fell Monday after dropping in May, a month that usually sees them post positive returns. U.S. equity index futures rose.

items.title: Are Ethereum OGs jumping ship? Here's what the data says
items.summary: Long-term whales have cashed out millions of dollars from Ethereum following the recent sell-off, potentially putting ETH at risk of further losses.

items.title: ECB official says stablecoins risk importing old market flaws
items.summary: ECB board member Isabel Schnabel warned that stablecoins could bring money-market risks into tokenized finance and reinforce US dollar dominance.

items.title: Anchorage rolls out platform to reduce crypto trading counterparty risk
items.summary: The crypto bank's new CMS platform lets institutions trade on crypto venues while keeping assets in regulated custody and reducing pre-funded accounts.

items.title: XRP falls 4% below $1.30 as bitcoin-led market weakness pulls down majors
items.summary: XRP hit fresh 15-week lows after losing a key support zone, with exchange outflows failing to offset persistent selling pressure.

items.title: Mt. Gox moves 10,422 bitcoin worth $739 million to a new wallet as deadline nears
items.summary: The 04:47 UTC Bitcoin block 952,072 transaction moved coins from Mt. Gox cold storage into a freshly generated address, with a smaller 116-bitcoin slice routed to the defunct exchange's hot wallet.

items.title: Bitcoin drops below $70,000 as stocks pause and Strategy's BTC sale weighs on crypto
items.summary: BTC fell 3.8% in 24 hours to below $69,960 , the lowest level in weeks, as Monday's 8-K filing disclosing Strategy's first publicized bitcoin sale continued to weigh.

items.title: Strategy sold bitcoin in late May, and told the market in June. Here's how Polymarket bettors are fighting over when it counts.
items.summary: A $79 million market hinges not on whether Michael Saylor's firm sold bitcoin, but on whether a sale disclosed June 1 can count toward a deadline that passed May 31.

items.title: Robinhood enters Canada after $180 million WonderFi acquisition
items.summary: Robinhood will enter Canada after its WonderFi acquisition brought local crypto exchanges Bitbuy and Coinsquare under its control.

items.title: Bitcoin falls to 2-month low as divergence from equities widens
items.summary: Santiment says that “the gap between traditional equities and crypto has become increasingly difficult for traders to ignore.”

items.title: Grayscale HYPE ETF ‘likely imminent’ as new update shows competitive fee: Analyst
items.summary: Grayscale proposed a fee of 0.29% on its Hyperliquid ETF, which “slightly undercuts” rivals 21Shares and Bitwise that carry respective fees of 0.3% and 0.34%, says analyst James Seyffart.

items.title: TON jumps 15% as The Open Network plans rebrand to Gram
items.summary: Telegram founder Pavel Durov says it is “returning to our roots — and starting a new chapter” by rebranding Toncoin to Gram.

items.title: Bitmine buys $52M ETH as Tom Lee says price not yet showing Ethereum’s strength
items.summary: Bitmine is aiming to hold 5% of the total circulating supply of 120.6 million Ether tokens and is about 90% of the way to its target after its latest purchase.

items.title: DeFi protocol Radiant to wind down after failing to recover from 2024 hack
items.summary: Radiant says its frontend and smart contracts will remain accessible and users will still be able to withdraw, repay, and manage their positions.

items.title: Crypto investment firm Keyrock is acquiring bankrupt lender Blockfills
items.summary: The Brussels-based digital asset services firm plans to purchase BlockFills months after the Chicago-based company filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy, if a court approves.
